<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-iū]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[fr:Coq d'eau]][[hak:Kui-yû]][[ja:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[nds:Water-Hahn]][[vi:Quý Dậu]][[za:Gveiqyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-iú]][[zh-yue:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]]

'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 10th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Water Monkey]] and followed by [[Yang Wood Dog]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Mizunoto (癸)]] represents yin [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Metal generates Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Years of Yin Water Rooster==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 13 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Water Rooster]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 13|13 AD]]
* [[AD 73|73 AD]]
* [[AD 133|133 AD]]
* [[193|193 AD]]
* [[253|253 AD]]
* [[313|313 AD]]
* [[373|373 AD]]
* [[433|433 AD]]
* [[493|493 AD]]
* [[553|553 AD]]
* [[613|613 AD]]
* [[673|673 AD]]
* [[733|733 AD]]
* [[793|793 AD]]
* [[853|853 AD]]
* [[913|913 AD]]
* [[973|973 AD]]
|
* [[1033|1033 AD]]
* [[1093|1093 AD]]
* [[1153|1153 AD]]
* [[1213|1213 AD]]
* [[1273|1273 AD]]
* [[1333|1333 AD]]
* [[1393|1393 AD]]
* [[1453|1453 AD]]
* [[1513|1513 AD]]
* [[1573|1573 AD]]
* [[1633|1633 AD]]
* [[1693|1693 AD]]
* [[1753|1753 AD]]
* [[1813|1813 AD]]
* [[1873|1873 AD]]
* [[1933|1933 AD]]
* [[1993|1993 AD]]
|
* [[2053 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2113 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2173 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2233 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2293 AD]]
* [[2353 AD]]
* [[2413 AD]]
* [[25th century|2473 AD]]
* [[2533 AD]]
* [[2593 AD]]
* [[2653 AD]]
* [[2713 AD]]
* [[2773 AD]]
* [[2833 AD]]
* [[2893 AD]]
* [[2953 AD]]
|}
==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Tsuchinoto (己)]]), the month of [[August]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Water Rooster]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Water Rooster]] is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of [[Yin Water Rooster]] is the 4th day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Large Earth]].

==See Also==
<!--Yin Water Rooster--><!--Yin Water Rooster-->

{{wikidata link|Q655662}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
